title: Pipeline Management
shortSummary: Your pipeline is your business. Learn CRM hygiene, forecast accuracy, deal velocity, and the operating rhythm that makes revenue predictable.
whyItMatters: A messy pipeline is a messy forecast, and a messy forecast means missed targets. Pipeline management is the operational backbone of sales. It tells you what is real, what is at risk, and where to focus your time. The best AEs manage their pipeline like a portfolio: constantly pruning, advancing, and rebalancing while keeping leaders confident in the commit.
coreConcepts: CRM hygiene: accurate data, timely updates
Weekly pipeline reviews and deal inspection
Using tools like Salesforce and Clari to defend forecast calls
